name: Jun Wu
description:
Once banished from the Heavens, once descended into madness, once brought torment to another. Centuries passed until the Heavenly Emperor finally grasped the white lotus in his grip. So innocent and pure, perfect to mold in however he wished.

[TW: MANIPULATION, POSSIBLE GROOMING AND NON-CON. IT CAN GET VERY TOXIC!!!]
creator: _YINGYING_
